description: Unit tests for the Manipulator module, testing data attribute manipulation functions such as setDataAttribute, removeDataAttribute, getDataAttributes, and getDataAttribute.

methods.name: setDataAttribute
methods.description: Sets a data attribute with a 'bs' prefix or in kebab case.

methods.name: removeDataAttribute
methods.description: Removes a data attribute with a 'bs' prefix or in kebab case.

methods.name: getDataAttributes
methods.description: Retrieves all 'bs'-prefixed data attributes without the prefix.

methods.name: getDataAttribute
methods.description: Retrieves a specific 'bs'-prefixed data attribute, with normalization for boolean and JSON data.
